[trading-framework #3] Architecture (Session 346). ENGINE: Engine.run()->CronScheduler->start(callback) polls every N seconds->connector.get_candles(symbol,interval,limit=1)->callback->Engine._on_candle()->strategy.on_candle()->Signal->Executor.execute(signal). SCHEDULER: time.sleep() polling, fixed interval, no cron expressions. CONNECTOR ABC: get_price, get_candles, submit_order, cancel_order, get_positions, get_balance, is_market_open; impls=PaperConnector+BinanceConnector(ccxt); Decimal throughout. STRATEGY ABC: on_candle()->Signal|None; MACrossoverStrategy=SMA crossover. EXECUTOR: Signal->Order->GateRunner.run_all()->Submit->Journal->Notify; blocked=logged warnings. PORTFOLIO: balance+positions via connector calls, no caching.

(4) TRIANGULATED VERIFICATION: deterministic rule + LLM-as-judge + human judgment; auto-run evals before skill deploy. (5) MULTI-DIMENSIONAL EVOLUTION: evolve tool presence+hook sequence+memory schema; monthly skill discovery scanner. STAGING: P1(wk1-2)=2+3; P2(wk3-5)=1+4;

[torus-voice-ios] TRANSCRIPT SEND FLOW voice->terminal. TRIGGERS (3): send button (#send-btn)->sendVoiceText(); Enter keydown (global); mic stop->start cycle. sendVoiceText() (app.js:230-243): gets #voice-input text (trimmed); sends WS {type:input,data:text+newline}; clears voiceInput.value; stops/restarts recognition (resets sendOffset); refocuses terminal. Linux Speech-to-Text for Claude Code (research). TIER1 OFFLINE: nerd-dictation(VOSK)=single-file Python, ~1.5s cold start, --output=STDOUT, easy piping, lower accuracy; whisper.cpp=C++ <300ms startup, streaming 5-7x slower; faster-whisper(CTranslate2)=30-40% faster RTF, 1.8s startup, best accuracy/speed. TIER2 CLI: voice2json=intent parsing built-in, JSONL output, 18 languages; PocketSphinx=<100ms overhead, lower accuracy. TIER3 CLOUD: Deepgram=$0.0077/min streaming, <300ms latency; AssemblyAI=$0.0025/min (cheapest). RECOMMENDATION: nerd-dictation with faster-whisper backend; keyboard shortcuts+STDOUT->faster-whisper->pipe to Claude Code stdin; latency 2-3s/utterance; cost $0. Alt if latency critical: Deepgram API (~4/month at 1h/day).

Whisper STT Research (Feb 2026) for Claude Code voice integration. MODELS: tiny(39M,~1GB), base(74M), small(244M,~2GB), medium(769M,~5GB), large(1550M,~10GB), turbo(809M,~6GB,8x faster,no translation). PERF: turbo=~8x faster; faster-whisper(CTranslate2)=4x faster+less memory; small CPU: ~466MB+~2GB RAM. API: whisper.load_model(turbo); model.transcribe(audio.mp3)->{text,segments,language}. OFFICIAL: file-based only, 30s sliding window, no streaming. REAL-TIME: WhisperLive(collabora)=faster-whisper+VAD, WebSocket, Docker, browser/iOS/CLI; whisper_streaming(ufal)=multiple backends; sox rec->whisper->xdotool pattern. RECOMMENDED: faster-whisper->Python CLI->JSON stdout; mic via pactl/sox; daemon mode piping to Claude Code stdin. INSTALL: pip install faster-whisper. CPU viable with small model.

Torus Framework Architecture coupling points & portability. HOOK INPUT: {tool_name:str, tool_input:dict, session_id:str, tool_response:dict?(PostToolUse), agent_type:str?(SubagentStart)}.
